WHERE basketball_match.all_road = '13–0' AND basketball_match.acc_percent = '.875' AND basketball_match.all_games = '35–2'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which university entities having at least one related basketball match record (linked on university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id) with all road equal to '13–0' and acc percent equal to '.875' and all games equal to '35–2'?

qa_pairs.question: Which universities in the MAC Commonwealth Conference ( D-III ) have basketball matches where the team name is Duke with an accuracy percent of .813, a home record of 15–1, and a neutral record of 5–3?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
JOIN basketball_match ON university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id
WHERE basketball_match.team_name = 'Duke' AND basketball_match.acc_percent = '.813' AND basketball_match.all_home = '15–1' AND university.primary_conference = 'MAC Commonwealth Conference ( D-III )' AND basketball_match.all_neutral = '5–3'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which university entities with primary conference equal to 'MAC Commonwealth Conference ( D-III )', having at least one related basketball match record (linked on university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id) with team name equal to 'Duke' and acc percent equal to '.813' and all home equal to '15–1' and all neutral equal to '5–3'?

qa_pairs.question: Which universities have an enrollment of at least 2100 and basketball teams named Duke with an all_home record of exactly 15–1?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
JOIN basketball_match ON university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id
WHERE basketball_match.all_home = '15–1' AND basketball_match.team_name = 'Duke' AND university.enrollment >= 2100.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which university entities with enrollment at least '2100.0', having at least one related basketball match record (linked on university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id) with all home equal to '15–1' and team name equal to 'Duke'?

qa_pairs.question: Which public universities founded in 1766 or later have the school name Rutgers University and basketball records with exactly 14–2 at home and exactly 3–5 on the road?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
JOIN basketball_match ON university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id
WHERE basketball_match.all_home = '14–2' AND university.affiliation = 'Public' AND university.school = 'Rutgers University' AND basketball_match.acc_road = '3–5' AND university.founded >= 1766.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which university entities with affiliation equal to 'Public' and school equal to 'Rutgers University' and founded at least '1766.0', having at least one related basketball match record (linked on university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id) with all home equal to '14–2' and acc road equal to '3–5'?

qa_pairs.question: Which universities with the nickname Scarlet Knights have basketball matches where acc_road is 3–5 and all_home is 14–2?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
JOIN basketball_match ON university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id
WHERE basketball_match.acc_road = '3–5' AND university.nickname = 'Scarlet Knights' AND basketball_match.all_home = '14–2'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which university entities with nickname equal to 'Scarlet Knights', having at least one related basketball match record (linked on university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id) with acc road equal to '3–5' and all home equal to '14–2'?

qa_pairs.question: What universities named Stony Brook University with the nickname Seawolves belong to the America East Conference ( D-I)?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT university.school_id FROM university
JOIN basketball_match ON university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id
WHERE university.primary_conference = 'America East Conference ( D-I )' AND university.nickname = 'Seawolves' AND university.school = 'Stony Brook University'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which university entities with primary conference equal to 'America East Conference ( D-I )' and nickname equal to 'Seawolves' and school equal to 'Stony Brook University', having at least one related basketball match record (linked on university.school_id = basketball_match.school_id)?
